name: Chalet Hotels Limited
summary: Chalet Hotels Limited develops, owns, and manages hotels in India. Its hotel platform comprises six operating hotels, including a hotel with a co-located serviced residence, located in Mumbai, Hyderabad, Pune, and Bengaluru representing 2,554 keys under the JW Marriott, Westin, Marriott, Marriott Executive Apartments, Renaissance, Four Points by Sheraton, and Novotel brands. The company is also involved in the commercial and retail operations, and real estate development. The company was formerly known as Chalet Hotels Pvt. Ltd and changed its name to Chalet Hotels Limited in June 2018. Chalet Hotels Limited was incorporated in 1986 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
